title: Link Each Status with a Date Deadline

posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community!

I work with an project with multiple deadlines. There is the feature that links the “date column” with the “Status column”, but it’s a bit limited, I can only link one date column…

I’d like to link all the date columns I have on my pannel to a single Status Column, and each Status I prompt concludes the specific column date I’ve linked to it.

Here’s a more detailed example:

ONE Status column have these status:

  1. Confirm payment
  2. Accept Contract
  3. Accept Deadline

Then, I have 3 Deadlines on 3 date columns:

  1. Payment Deadline
  2. Contract Deadline
  3. Accept Deadline

I would like to link each deadline to its corresponding status, When It’s completed or moved to the next one, the old deadline is completed.

Today I have to create one status column per date column.

Would be possible to implement it?

posts.author: Aulysius_Corner_Rep (Mateusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
